OneStop statics — two design directions

Same two posts, two treatments. Direction A is photoreal product-render — quiet, premium, the object is real. Direction B is illustrated storybook — cartoonish, dramatic, built to stop the scroll. Both carry the identical verified data and the OneStop brand system (Manrope, navy/electric-blue/cyan, green as the positive accent). Pick a lane, or mix by post.

India · UPI growth
Value paid over UPI per financial year, FY21 ₹41 → FY26 ₹314 lakh crore (NPCI) · @hellojarvis_ind
A · Photoreal — "The Rise of the Scan"

Six real QR standees ascending on a chai counter — the standees are the chart, the chai glass sets the scale.

B · Illustrated — "Mount UPI"

A mountain built of QR tiles; the ledges are the years, the climber plants the green flag at ₹314.

US · Shrinkflation
Snacks +26.4% since Jan 2019, 9.8 pts of it purely from downsizing (U.S. Senate shrinkflation report, Dec 2023 · BLS) · @hellojarvis_us
A · Photoreal — "Same price. Fewer chips."

Two cutaway foil bags, 2019 vs today — the air is the data: "You're paying for this air."

B · Illustrated — "The Shrink Ray"

A sci-fi machine zaps the bag smaller on the conveyor; both bags wear the same price tag.

Drafts for review — nothing published to Instagram. Data verified against NPCI monthly/annual statistics and the U.S. Senate shrinkflation report (Dec 2023). Built July 3, 2026.
